title: justicia pilosocordata
intro: Justicia pilosocordata, also known as "Makabuhay" or "Tree of Life," is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Justicia pilosocordata is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Filipino medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
